PaddingChar - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
For INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV:
This is used to indicate what value need to pad on data string before encryption.
PAN - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse
Account Number or tag 5A (PAN), will be encrypted if the data encryption is enabled.
Pan - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.Original
Last 4 digits of account number for original transaction.
Conditional for matching card on terminal in subsequent transactions after SALE, i.e.
PanSeqNum - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse.PaymentEmvTag
Tag 5F34.
Identifies and differentiates cards with the same PAN.

PaymentAccountReferenceID - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse
The unique identifier is associated with a specific cardholder PAN.
Non-sensitive value that can be stored/managed in place of a PAN or Token.
Typically used for card-brand loyalty benefits.
PaymentAccountReferenceID - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
The unique identifier is associated with a specific cardholder PAN.
Non-sensitive value that can be stored/managed in place of a PAN or Token.
Typically used for card-brand loyalty benefits.

Response PaymentEmvTag

Indicate the payment type.
PaymentType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportRequest
Indicate the payment type.
PaymentType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
The payment type.
PickupCity - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.AutoRentalInfo
City where rental period started.
PickupCountryCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.AutoRentalInfo
Country where rental period started.
PickupDatetime - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.AutoRentalInfo
Start of rental period timestamp.
PickupLocationName - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.AutoRentalInfo
The name or ID of the location where the vehicle was picked up.
PickupState - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.AutoRentalInfo
State where rental period started.
PinAlgorithm - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
When the Encryption Type is 1(DES DUKPT) or 2(Master Session DES):
The value is as below, default to 0:
0: ISO9564_0
1: ISO9564_1
3: ISO9564_3
When the Encryption Type is 3(AES DUKPT):
The value is as below, default to 4:
4: ISO9564_4
Valid for GETPINBLOCK/AUTHORIZECARD
PinBlock - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse
The PIN BLOCK.
PINBypass - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
This field is effective only when PIN is required.
PinBypassStatus - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse
Indicate whether PIN bypassed.
PinMaxLength - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
MAX length for PIN entry.
PinMinLength - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
MIN length for PIN entry.
PinpadType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Pinpad Type:
PinpadType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse
Pinpad Type:
PinStatusNum - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.TransInfo
PIN entry status.
PONum - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest
Deprecated.
(deprecated since V1.02.00). Please use PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.PONumber

Attribute: ans…25

PONumber - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard
The order number supplied by the merchant.
POSData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.AddlRspData
MCPOSData for MasterCard or DiscPOSData for Discover or AmExPOSData for AMEX.
POSEntryMode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.AddlRspData
POSEntryMode.
POSEntryModeChg - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.AddlRspData
POSEntryModeChg for MasterCard.
PosLink - Class in com.pax.poslink
This class implement communication with POS terminal which comply with "PAX_Interface_Between_ECR_PC_and_Terminal".

Construction method Initial a newly create POSLink object .
PosLink(ProcessFactoryDefault, ProxyFactory) - Constructor for class com.pax.poslink.PosLink
construction method Initial a newly create POSLink object

PrintCopy - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Attribute: n1
Indicate how many receipts want to print.Default is 1.
Only valid when TransType = PRINTER.
PrintData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Variable length up to 4000.

ProcessTrans() - Method in class com.pax.poslink.AbstractPosLink
Send message according to the input objects ,and the receive response from POS terminal and unpack it,then create the corresponding response object.
ProcessTrans(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.AbstractPosLink
Send low-level messages and return the Response from POS terminal.
ProcessTrans(List<String>) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.AbstractPosLink
Send low-level messages and return the list of Response from POS terminal.

8 digits bitmap for disabling program prompts.
